items.title: Como Boss Cesc Fabregas Praises Players After Securing Champions League Spot
items.summary: Cesc Fabregas has heaped praise on his Como players, describing them as the best group he will ever manage, after the club secured a historic Champions League qualification.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: French Open - schedule, seedings and how to follow
items.summary: The second Grand Slam of the year is under way as players head to Paris for the French Open - here's all you need to know.

items.title: Neville leaves MLS strugglers Portland Timbers
items.summary: Portland Timbers confirm that they have parted company with head coach Phil Neville by mutual consent.
